Software Engineer with 3+ years of experience in C#, JavaScript and cloud-native technologies. Skilled in distributed systems, serverless solutions on AWS, and full SDLC delivery.

// About Me

Software Engineer · San Jose, CA

Vinay Varma Pericherla

Software Engineer

Software Engineer with over 3 years of hands-on development experience in C#, JavaScript and cloud-native technologies. Skilled in full SDLC, designing distributed systems and serverless solutions on AWS to drive real-time data processing and reduce manual overhead. Proven collaborator in agile teams and code reviews, ensuring best practices for reliability and performance.

English—Fluent
Telugu—Native
Hindi—Proficient

M.P.S. in Software Engineering

University of Maryland, Baltimore County

Aug 2022 – Jun 2024 · Baltimore, MD

// Work Experience

Software Engineer with 3+ years building distributed systems and cloud-native solutions

Cisco  |  Software Engineer

Sep 2024 – Present · San Jose, CA
  • Engineered distributed data pipelines using AWS EMR and Spark with NoSQL databases to process 1.2TB of daily telemetry data, enabling real-time detection of network threats.
  • Developed full-stack features in C# and JavaScript for internal network monitoring tools, collaborating in design reviews to ensure scalable and maintainable implementations.
  • Architected serverless solutions using AWS Lambda, SQS, and Fargate to automate vendor data onboarding and security auditing, reducing manual overhead by 25%.
  • Led architecture and code reviews of .NET backend services in C#, maintaining 99.9% uptime for mission-critical defensive applications.
  • Conducted system resilience testing and vulnerability assessments on critical security libraries across distributed cloud environments.

Humana (Tata Consultancy Services)  |  Associate Software Engineer

Aug 2021 – Aug 2022 · Hyderabad, India
  • Architected scalable backend microservices for healthcare data management on SAP BTP, implementing automated enrollment workflows that processed 15,000+ clinical records.
  • Optimized distributed data processing layers and integrated NoSQL solutions, reducing data retrieval latency to under 300ms for high-volume customer datasets.
  • Contributed to the full SDLC for cloud-native services, participating in design reviews and conducting peer code reviews to enforce best practices.
  • Collaborated with cross-disciplinary security teams to troubleshoot complex production issues and implement architectural fixes to enhance system resilience.

// My Work

Projects from github.com/vinay0304

Distributed File Storage System

Fault-tolerant distributed key-value store in Go using gRPC, consistent hashing with virtual nodes, and primary-backup replication. Handles 500+ concurrent requests at sub-millisecond latency.

GogRPCProtocol BuffersDockerConsistent Hashing
Code

Real-Time Sentiment Analysis Engine

Live tweet ingestion pipeline using Kafka producer/consumer, Spark Streaming for processing, MongoDB for persistence, and a Flask dashboard for real-time sentiment visualization.

PythonKafkaSparkMongoDBFlaskTwitter API
Code

ML Course Predictor

Predicts graduate course suitability and admission chances from academic profiles using ensemble ML models and semantic similarity via Sentence-Transformers. Interactive Streamlit UI.

PythonScikit-learnSentence-TransformersStreamlitPandas
Code

AI Operations Dashboard

Interactive analytics dashboard for monitoring AI model performance, costs, and resource utilization. Features KPI tracking, latency trend charts, automated anomaly detection, and CPU/GPU monitoring.

PythonStreamlitPlotlySQLitePandas
Code

Gym Logger

Full-featured workout tracking app to log exercises, sets, weights, and reps. Categorized by muscle group with progress history, edit support, and password-protected data reset.

PythonStreamlitPandas
Code Live

Gym Logger BETA

Next iteration of the Gym Logger with enhanced features and improved UX. Built with Python and Streamlit for a seamless workout tracking experience.

PythonStreamlitPandas
Code
